title: SquirrelChat: proper account system with email verification and token management
description: Build a real account/auth system for SquirrelChat replacing the current name-claim flow. Triggered by jkh feedback that auth gate is in the wrong place (mid-send prompt vs. pre-UI gate). The immediate UX fix (hide #app until login) shipped in a4c5665. This task covers the full account system.
requirements: Registration: POST /api/register with {username, email} — sends HTML verification email with one-time link
Email link /verify?token=<otp> → creates user, issues persistent token, redirects to UI showing token with copy prompt
Login page (not modal): username + token fields, 'remember me' saves to localStorage
Forgot token / reset: enter email → triggers re-verification flow, invalidates old token
Token shown exactly once after verification — user encouraged to save to password manager
On return visit with no saved token: show login page (username + token)
On 401 mid-session: non-intrusive banner (already shipped), 'sign in again' → login page
Email must be confirmed within 1 hour or the pending registration expires
All users have: id, username, email (verified), token_hash, created_at, last_seen
open_questions: SMTP config: do we have an outbound email provider on do-host1? (sendgrid, SES, postfix?)
Should username be changeable after registration?
Multi-device: does one token work everywhere or per-device tokens?
Admin bootstrap: how does the first admin account get created (env var token stays as escape hatch?)
Rate limiting on /register and /reset to prevent abuse?

backend_changes: New DB table: pending_registrations(id, username, email, otp_hash, expires_at)
Alter users table: add email TEXT UNIQUE, add token_hash (already exists), drop plaintext token col
POST /api/register: validate username unique + email unique, insert pending_registration, send email via nodemailer
GET /api/verify?token=<otp>: look up pending, check expiry, create user row, generate sc-token, return redirect to /?verified=1&token=<tok>
POST /api/reset: look up email, invalidate existing token, insert new pending_registration, send email
POST /api/login stays for token-based auth (username + token → verify, return user)
Keep ADMIN_TOKEN env var as escape hatch for agents/admin
frontend_changes: Replace login modal with a proper /login route (full-page, not modal)
Add /verify route: handles redirect from email link, shows token with copy button
Add /reset route: email input → 'check your email' confirmation
localStorage: save {username, token} on 'remember me' checkbox (default on)
Boot: if no localStorage session → redirect to /login
email: nodemailer with SMTP config from env (SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS, SMTP_FROM)
HTML email template: SquirrelChat branding, big CTA button, fallback text link
security: OTP stored as SHA-256 hash, not plaintext
Token stored as bcrypt hash (or SHA-256 with salt) — plaintext never in DB
Rate limit /register and /reset to 3 req/hour per IP
